## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Internal / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run ci` passes locally (lint, typecheck, test, build)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant
